storyboard.content: I have severe crushing chest pain that started suddenly about an hour ago
The pain shoots down both my arms
I am short of breath and it came on at the same time as the chest pain
I feel very dizzy and my heart is racing
The pain is a 9 out of 10, I am soaking through my clothes with sweat, and I feel like I might pass out
This all started suddenly one hour ago and it is getting worse
I have had heart problems before including a heart attack, and I take several heart medications
This feels much worse than any chest pain I have had before
